title: Chinese Foods
description: This mod adds Chinese food to Minecraft.
body:
# Overview

## Chinese Foods - CF

### This is a mod with many Chinese delicacies

- Chinese Foods, or CF for short, adds different classic Chinese foods to our beloved game, Minecraft.

- This mod only has English and Chinese translation packs.

- If you want to eat Chinese food in Minecraft, please download this mod.

- This mod is in beta, it's being worked on.

- Not yet compatible with other mods

- Use JEI if needed!

### As of now (July 28th, 2024) the mod has:

#### Foods:

- Bean juice

- Fired ring

- Salted vegetable

#### Crops:

- Mung Beans

- Rutabaga
